process.label: The Process
process.heading: How Apex Works
process.body: Simple for you. Handled by us. Every step of the cross‑border journey is managed end‑to‑end.
process.cardBody: From the moment you contact us to final delivery, we manage every detail — paperwork, routing, border clearance, monitoring. No handoffs. No excuses.
process.alt: Apex team coordinating freight at a border crossing.
steps: 1. Tell Us the Load — We handle the rest.
2. We Find the Truck — Matched to verified partners.
5. Safe Delivery — On time, no excuses.

cta.heading: Need a solution?

whatIs.heading:
Paperwork.
Permits. Compliance.
whatIs.body: Every cross-border load crosses at least two customs jurisdictions. One missing document, one wrong HS code, one unpaid duty — and your truck sits at the gate. Border clearance is the full chain: export docs, import permits, transit bonds, duty payments, and physical release. Most shippers get it wrong once. We get it right every time.

whyApex.title: Bonded Carrier
whyApex.body: Holds bonded carrier status at every major border. Your cargo moves under our bond.

whyApex.title: Locals at the Gate
whyApex.body: Agents are at the border, not in an office. They speak the language and clear your paperwork before the truck arrives.

whyApex.title: Digital First
whyApex.body: ASYCUDA declarations and pre-filed docs handled digitally. No last-minute surprises.

whyApex.title: 6-Hour Dispatch
whyApex.body: WhatsApp us. We assign a truck and agent within 6 hours. No call-centre queues.

borderClearance.processSummary: Bonded carrier at Beit Bridge, Kazungula, Chirundu, Kasumbalesa & more.

cta.heading: Ready to clear?
cta.sub: Tell us your route and cargo. We handle every document — no gate delays.

cta.heading: Need a truck?
cta.sub: We match the right vehicle to your load.

hero.heading: Africa's hands-on logistics partner
hero.sub: Bulk and heavy cargo — from port to mine, no excuses.

companyOverview.title: About Apex Transport Group
companyOverview.body: Proudly South African. We move copper, cobalt, coal, chrome and general freight across 6 countries. End-to-end ownership: truck sourcing, border docs, customs, GPS tracking, delivery proof.

list.name: Freight Brokerage
list.description: Vetted network of owner-operators and fleet carriers. Rate negotiation, carrier contracting, load confirmation, dispatch, and real-time status reporting.

list.name: Border and Customs Management
list.description: Full administrative chain at every crossing — export/import docs, customs clearance across SA, Zimbabwe, Zambia, DRC, Malawi, Botswana, transit permits, and liaison with border agencies.

list.name: Route Planning
list.description: Mapping the safest, fastest, most fuel-efficient corridors factoring in border delays, road conditions, and security. Real-time re-routing when issues arise.

countries.name: Zimbabwe
countries.hubs: Beit Bridge, Chirundu borders; Harare and Bulawayo distribution

countries.name: Zambia
countries.hubs: Lusaka, Ndola — Copperbelt link; Kasumbalesa border

countries.name: Botswana
countries.hubs: Gaborone, Francistown; Tlokweng and Kazungula borders

countries.name: Malawi
countries.hubs: Blantyre and Lilongwe — Mchinji border access

hero.headline:
One Truck.
Everyone's Cargo.
hero.subheadline: Share a truck on your route — pay only for your tons.

steps.label: Drop-Off
steps.sub: Consignments arrive at depot and join a shared corridor run.
steps.detail: Drop freight today for a truck leaving tomorrow.

steps.label: Consolidation
steps.sub: One truck, one load plan. Each shipper tracked individually.
steps.detail: See your portion, your cost, your delivery confirmation.

steps.label: Departure
steps.sub: Truck leaves on Apex's existing corridor — same reliability, lower cost.
steps.detail: Same route, border agents, and monitoring as a dedicated truck.

calculator.heading: Instant Estimate
calculator.disclaimerBody: Indicative ranges based on weight-band rates. Chargeable weight = higher of actual weight or volumetric (loading metres × 1.75 t/m). For precise quote, WhatsApp us.

reasons.title: Lower Cost
reasons.body: Pay only for your tons. Split the truck cost with other shippers.

reasons.title: Faster Dispatch
reasons.body: Truck already running your route — cargo moves sooner.

reasons.title: Full Traceability
reasons.body: Your portion tracked individually with its own sub-manifest.

reasons.title: Backhaul Savings
reasons.body: Return-truck pricing means lower rates for you.

corridors.heading: Where We Operate
corridors.sub: From Durban to DDC — corridors that move SADC.

items.title: Insurance Compliant
items.body: Same bonded carrier insurance as dedicated trucks. Fully covered.

items.title: GPS Tracking
items.body: Track your portion via our tracking page.

items.title: Proof of Delivery
items.body: POD certificates coming soon. Request from dispatch now.

items.question: Minimum weight?
items.answer: No minimum. Even half-ton pallets join existing runs.

items.question: How much longer?
items.answer: Same or faster — truck already running your route.

items.question: What documents?
items.answer: Addresses, cargo details, special handling. We handle the rest.

items.question: Can I track separately?
items.answer: Yes — unique sub-manifest reference per shipper.

items.question: Exact delivery date?
items.answer: We batch to meet deadlines. Dedicated truck available if needed.
